0.text: Mosaic attenuation pattern in both lungs

1.text: Minimal paraseptal emphysema in both lungs, more prominent in the upper lobes and peripherally

2.text: Subcentimeter ground glass nodules in a centriacinar distribution in the anterior part of the left upper lobe and the lingular segment

3.text: Linear subsegmental atelectasis and fibrotic densities in the left upper lobe lingular segment and the laterobasal and posterobasal sections of the left lower lobe

4.text: Nonspecific pulmonary nodules, some calcified, in various locations in both lungs
